TC-S5-003-01.description: Click Search button, verify search dialog opens with input field

TC-S5-003-02.description: Enter query 'passport number', verify Gemini finds and highlights relevant text

TC-S5-003-03.description: Document has 3 matching paragraphs, verify all 3 highlighted with yellow background

TC-S5-003-04.description: Query in German 'Reisepassnummer' on English document with 'passport number', verify English text highlighted

TC-S5-003-05.description: Query in English 'birth date' on German document with 'Geburtsdatum', verify German text highlighted

TC-S5-003-06.description: Verify search results indicator shows '3 matches found'

TC-S5-003-07.description: Click next arrow, verify navigation to second highlight with active indicator

TC-S5-003-08.description: Click previous arrow, verify navigation back to first highlight

TC-S5-003-09.description: PDF document, verify text extracted automatically and search works correctly

TC-S5-003-10.description: Perform search with no matches, verify message 'No matches found'

TC-S5-003-11.description: Multiple words/phrases highlighted, verify each has individual highlight span

TC-S5-003-12.description: Close search, verify highlights clear and document returns to normal view

TC-S5-003-13.description: Semantic query 'when was the person born' matches 'Date of Birth: 15.05.1990'

TC-S5-003-14.description: Search in Arabic document with German query, verify cross-language matching works
